name: recruiter_outreach_cold
description: Cold recruiter outreach about a specific role → opportunity in Interaction folder.

email.subject: Forward Deployed Engineer opportunity at Clera
email.body_text:
Hi Jordan,

I came across your profile and think you'd be a great fit for our Forward Deployed Engineer role at Clera. We're building AI tooling for finance teams. Would you be open to a quick chat this week?

Role details: https://getclera.example/careers/fde

Best,
Sam
